title: MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing
description: Transforms Minecraft ores into 3D glowing models. Works in Vanilla and with mods (Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, Quilt). A separate version for Continuity users is available in another post. Shaders are not necessary
body:
**MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing — Resource Pack**

**IMPORTANT: SODIUM displays an incompatibility message, but there's no problem; it's just because my models already have CullFace integrated, since SODIUM wasn't able to do it with this resource package.**

![MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33887c072023674d1ca035430806c01b185e78d_0.webp)

![donations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec3d8a5316b0b542a54ce2fe11aeebf8862eed7.png)
[A donation makes my time worthwhile; please consider supporting me if you like this content.](https://paypal.me/MrTuGaaGames)

MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing is a resource pack that transforms Minecraft ores into custom 3D models with unique glowing effects, designed to work flawlessly in Minecraft Vanilla without the need for mods, shaders, or OptiFine.

This pack is also fully compatible with modded environments, including loaders like Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, and Quilt, making it a versatile option for all types of players.

Additionally, there is a standalone version optimized for users who use Continuity, ensuring visual compatibility with connected texture systems, available in a separate publication created by me: [MrOres 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-glowing-(optifinecontinuity))

![MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee935b15648aa91d569a4861c1bfe2427e79ad38_0.webp)

✨ Features:
Custom 3D models for all ores

Glowing effects visible in dark and dynamic environments

Compatible with Minecraft Vanilla and modded (Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, Quilt)

Special version for Continuity users available in a separate post: [MrOres 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-glowing-(optifinecontinuity))

Does not require OptiFine or external shaders

![MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69db3f3d96c650550e38506e88f994b6897a0b00_0.webp)

Terms of Use for the Resource Pack “MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing”  
Created by: MrTuGaa

This resource pack was created solely for aesthetic purposes within Minecraft Java Edition. It includes models, textures, and other visual elements designed by the original author.

✅ Allowed:
- Use the resource pack to play Minecraft.
- Share the resource pack on social media, videos, servers, or communities **as long as the official download link is included**.
- Include the resource pack in modpacks or collections, **without modifying it** and **keeping its original name**.

❌ Not Allowed:
- Sell, monetize, or distribute the resource pack as if it were your own.
- Modify, rename, or alter any part of the content.
- Reuse models or textures in other projects without explicit permission from the author.

This work is protected by copyright. Any unauthorized use will be considered a legal violation.

---

Términos de uso del resource pack “MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing”  
Creado por: MrTuGaa

Este resource pack ha sido creado con fines exclusivamente estéticos para su uso dentro del juego Minecraft Java Edition. Incluye modelos, texturas y otros elementos visuales diseñados por su autor original.

✅ Permitido:
- Usar el resource pack para jugar Minecraft.
- Compartir el resource pack en redes sociales, videos, servidores o comunidades **siempre que se incluya el enlace oficial de descarga**.
- Incluir el resource pack en modpacks o colecciones, **sin modificarlo** y **respetando su nombre original**.

❌ Prohibido:
- Vender, monetizar o distribuir el resource pack como si fuera propio.
- Modificar, renombrar o alterar cualquier parte del contenido.
- Reutilizar modelos o texturas en otros proyectos sin autorización expresa del autor.

Este trabajo está protegido por derechos de autor. Cualquier uso no autorizado será considerado una infracción legal.
